pages.text: Barrel accepts items and fluids. Use the container slot or right click with buckets to move fluids.
Seal barrel in UI button or Shift + Right Click with empty hand. Sealed barrel can be broken and keeps contents.

pages.title: Warnings
pages.text: $(#E5C95A)Exact ratio is required for barrel recipes.$() If input does not match the recipe ratio, $(#D94B4B)excess items or fluids are lost.$()
